children.heading: Counterfeiting
children.label: 1 Counterfeiting
children.text: With intent to defraud, alters, forges, makes, or counterfeits any stamp, coupon, ticket, book, or other device prescribed under authority of this title for the collection or payment of any tax imposed by this title, or sells, lends, or has in his possession any such altered, forged, or counterfeited stamp, coupon, ticket, book, or other device, or makes, uses, sells, or has in his possession any material in imitation of the material used in the manufacture of such stamp, coupon, ticket, book, or other device; or

children.heading: Mutilation or removal
children.label: 2 Mutilation or removal
children.text: Fraudulently cuts, tears, or removes from any vellum, parchment, paper, instrument, writing, package, or article, upon which any tax is imposed by this title, any adhesive stamp or the impression of any stamp, die, plate, or other article provided, made, or used in pursuance of this title; or

children.heading: Use of mutilated, insufficient, or counterfeited stamps
children.label: 3 Use of mutilated, insufficient, or counterfeited stamps
A
children.text: any adhesive stamp, or the impression of any stamp, die, plate, or other article, which has been cut, torn, or removed from any other vellum, parchment, paper, instrument, writing, package, or article, upon which any tax is imposed by this title; or

children.label: B
children.text: any adhesive stamp or the impression of any stamp, die, plate, or other article of insufficient value; or

children.label: C
children.text: any forged or counterfeited stamp, or the impression of any forged or counterfeited stamp, die, plate, or other article; or

children.heading: Preparation for reuse
children.label: A Preparation for reuse
children.text: Willfully removes, or alters the cancellation or defacing marks of, or otherwise prepares, any adhesive stamp, with intent to use, or cause the same to be used, after it has already been used; or

children.heading: Trafficking
children.label: B Trafficking
children.text: Knowingly or willfully buys, sells, offers for sale, or gives away, any such washed or restored stamp to any person for use, or knowingly uses the same; or

children.heading: Possession
children.label: C Possession
children.text: Knowingly and without lawful excuse (the burden of proof of such excuse being on the accused) has in possession any washed, restored, altered stamp, which has been removed from any vellum, parchment, paper, instrument, writing, package, or article; or

children.heading: Emptied stamped packages
children.label: 5 Emptied stamped packages
children.text: Commits the offense described in section 7271 (relating to disposal and receipt of stamped packages) with intent to defraud the revenue, or to defraud any person;
